notes: Heavy-artillery specialist base — the map's sole example of its kind. Has no light-vehicle or basic-infantry production at all; its sole production building fields only the heaviest siege vehicles in the roster, the most extreme case of skipping straight to a late-game roster. Starts with a strong garrison from the outset since it has no infantry to garrison with otherwise, and doubles down on the explosives theme with additional specialty defenses alongside the standard set.
